termsPrivacyScreen.introText: We have summarized the key points of our legal documents so you can clearly understand how TwinPro works, how your data is processed, and what responsibilities are associated with using the service.
termsPrivacyScreen.dataPrivacyDesc:
Your personal data is processed in accordance with applicable regulations (GDPR and applicable law). Your communications are protected with appropriate security measures and we do not sell your personal data.

Some data may be shared with technology providers only when necessary to deliver the service or by legal obligation.
termsPrivacyScreen.digitalTwinDesc:
In TwinPro you can interact with AI-based Digital Twins, configured or supervised by professionals.

Generated responses:
• Are automated
• Are informational and advisory
• Do not replace professional human care or advice
• May be inaccurate, incomplete, or outdated.
termsPrivacyScreen.userResponsibilityDesc:
By using TwinPro, you agree to:
• Use the service respectfully and in accordance with the law
• Not engage in improper, abusive, or fraudulent use
• Not base critical decisions solely on information provided by the platform or digital twins

Violation of these rules may result in account suspension or cancellation.
termsPrivacyScreen.paymentsDesc:
TwinPro may offer:
• Free features
• Paid services through credits, subscriptions, or other models

You will always be informed before any charge is made. Financial terms are detailed in the Terms of Service.
termsPrivacyScreen.disclaimer: This summary does not replace the full legal document. By using the app, you accept the official Terms & Conditions.

helpCenterScreen.faq1Question: How do I contact a professional avatar?
helpCenterScreen.faq1Answer: You can browse the Directory, select a professional and press "Start Chat". The avatar will respond instantly.
helpCenterScreen.faq2Answer: Yes, all conversations are end-to-end encrypted to ensure your privacy and security.
helpCenterScreen.faq3Question: How does the digital twin work?
helpCenterScreen.faq3Answer: The digital twin is a trained replica of the real professional, available 24/7 to answer your initial queries.

sendFeedbackScreen.description: Your feedback is essential to us. Send us your suggestions, bug reports, or any comments to improve your experience with our professionals.

creditsScreen.heroSubtitle: This application is the result of the passion, effort, and creativity of many talented people.
creditsScreen.specialThanks1: Thanks to our families and friends for their unconditional support during the development of TwinPro.
creditsScreen.specialThanks2: We also thank the open source community. TwinPro uses amazing projects that allow us to build better software. License details can be found in the "Licenses" section.

licensesScreen.introText: TwinPro uses open source software to deliver the best possible experience. We thank the authors and contributors of the following libraries and tools.
licensesScreen.footerText: All trademarks are property of their respective owners.

notificationSettingsScreen.infoBanner: Configure which notifications you want to receive in your professional dashboard

notificationSettingsScreen.footerNote: Escalation notifications are always recommended as they are critical for your business.

privacyPolicyScreen.introText: At TwinPro, we take your data privacy very seriously. This document details how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when interacting with our professional avatars.
privacyPolicyScreen.summary1Desc: We only store the data necessary (email, phone) to manage your account.
privacyPolicyScreen.summary2Desc: Your conversations with avatars are encrypted and protected.
privacyPolicyScreen.summary3Desc: You can download or delete your data from your profile at any time.
privacyPolicyScreen.section1Intro: We collect information to provide and improve our communication services. Data types include:
privacyPolicyScreen.section1Bullet1Desc: Name, email address, phone number, and profile photo.
privacyPolicyScreen.section1Bullet2Desc: Encrypted conversations with professional avatars to improve response context.
privacyPolicyScreen.section1Bullet3Desc: Usage frequency, directory interactions, and avatar preferences.
privacyPolicyScreen.section2Intro: The collected information is primarily used to ensure professional avatars respond accurately and helpfully. Additionally, we use the data for:
privacyPolicyScreen.section3Text: We implement industry-level security measures, including end-to-end encryption for sensitive chats. Your data is stored on secure servers with access restricted to authorized personnel only. We retain your information only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy.
privacyPolicyScreen.section4Text: As a TwinPro user, you have the right to access, rectify, or delete your personal data at any time. You can also object to the processing of certain data or request its portability.
privacyPolicyScreen.acceptTerms: By using TwinPro, you accept these terms.

termsOfServiceScreen.section1Text: Welcome to our application. By accessing and using our avatar communication services, you agree to be bound by the following terms and conditions. Our platform facilitates the connection between users and digital representations ("Avatars") of verified professionals. Please read these terms carefully before continuing.
termsOfServiceScreen.section2Intro: The avatars available on this platform are representations generated or managed by real professionals. However, you should note the following:
termsOfServiceScreen.section2Item1: The advice provided through the chat interface is for informational purposes and does not replace an in-person professional consultation in emergency situations.
termsOfServiceScreen.section2Item2: You agree to treat the avatars and the professionals behind them with respect and courtesy at all times.
termsOfServiceScreen.section3Text: Your conversations are end-to-end encrypted. We do not share the content of your chats with third parties without your explicit consent, unless required by law. For more details, see our Privacy Policy.
termsOfServiceScreen.autoRenewalText: Pro profile subscriptions are automatically renewed at the end of each billing cycle unless cancelled at least 24 hours in advance.
termsOfServiceScreen.section5Text: The company is not liable for decisions made based solely on information provided by the avatars. Use of the service is at your own risk.
termsOfServiceScreen.acceptTerms: By using TwinPro, you accept these terms.

helpProDashboard.headerSubtitle: Everything you need to know about your professional dashboard and how to get the most out of it.
helpProDashboard.faq1q: How do I activate or deactivate my Digital Twin?
helpProDashboard.faq1a: Use the switch on the 'Your Digital Twin' card. When active (green), it will automatically handle queries. You can deactivate it at any time.
helpProDashboard.faq2a: It means your twin is configured and ready to serve clients. If it shows another status, you may need to complete the setup in 'Configure'.
helpProDashboard.faq3q: How do I edit my twin's personality?
helpProDashboard.faq3a: Tap 'Configure' on the twin card to access appearance, behavior, and knowledge base settings.
helpProDashboard.faq4a: It's when the twin transfers the conversation to you (the real professional). This can happen if the client requests it, if the twin can't respond, or due to specific keywords.
helpProDashboard.faq5q: How do I edit my public profile?
helpProDashboard.faq5a: Tap your profile photo or go to the menu and select 'My public profile'. From there you can edit name, bio, photo, services, and more.
helpProDashboard.faq6q: What do the visit statistics mean?
helpProDashboard.faq6a: Visits show how many people have viewed your profile. Conversions indicate how many started a conversation. A high conversion rate indicates a good profile.
helpProDashboard.faq7q: Where does the 'This week' data come from?
helpProDashboard.faq7a: These are statistics from the last 7 days. They include profile visits, conversations started, appointments booked, and earnings if you have a Professional plan or higher.
helpProDashboard.faq8q: Why don't I see the Appointments block?
helpProDashboard.faq8a: Appointment management is available on Professional plan or higher. Upgrade your plan to unlock this feature.
helpProDashboard.faq9q: How do I set my availability schedule?
helpProDashboard.faq9a: Go to menu > 'My work schedule'. There you can define days and hours when you accept appointments, breaks, and holidays.
helpProDashboard.faq10a: If enabled, appointments are automatically confirmed without you having to approve them manually. Useful if you have clear availability.
helpProDashboard.faq11a: Yes, enable 'Require payment' in the appointment settings. Clients will pay when booking. You need to have Stripe configured.
helpProDashboard.faq12q: Where do I see my earnings?
helpProDashboard.faq12a: The 'Income' block shows your earnings. For full details, go to menu > 'Plans and credits' > 'Payment history'.
helpProDashboard.faq13q: How do I receive my payments?
helpProDashboard.faq13a: Payments are processed through Stripe. Set up your bank account in 'Plans and credits' to receive automatic transfers.
helpProDashboard.faq14q: Can I rearrange the dashboard blocks?
helpProDashboard.faq14a: Yes, tap the floating button with the grid icon to enter edit mode. Use the arrows to reorder blocks according to your preference.
helpProDashboard.faq15a: It allows you to customize the layout of blocks on your dashboard. When active, you'll see up/down arrows on each block to move them.
helpProDashboard.faq16a: It's where you see conversations that require your personal intervention. It includes escalations from the twin and direct messages from clients.
helpProDashboard.faq17q: How do I know if I have pending messages?
helpProDashboard.faq17a: The bell icon in the header shows a red number if you have unread notifications. You'll also receive push notifications if enabled.
helpProDashboard.faq18a: Starter (free): basic features. Professional: appointments, advanced statistics. Premium: cloned voice, custom avatar, all features.
helpProDashboard.faq19q: How do I upgrade my plan?
helpProDashboard.faq19a: Go to menu > 'Plans and credits'. There you can see your current plan and upgrade options with their benefits.
helpProDashboard.faq20a: Yes, you can cancel at any time from 'Plans and credits'. You'll keep access until the end of the billing period.
helpProDashboard.faq21q: How do I access the full menu?
helpProDashboard.faq21a: Tap the menu icon (three lines) in the top right corner. There you'll find all options organized by categories.
helpProDashboard.faq22q: What options does the menu have?
helpProDashboard.faq22a: My Business (profile, reviews, schedule), Agenda (appointments), Digital Twin (history, performance), Account (plans, notifications), and Help.

escalationKeyword.title: To make sure I help you in the best way possible…

Would you like to speak directly with the professional?

Based on what you're saying, this topic may require human attention.

You can continue talking with the digital twin or, if you wish, escalate the conversation. Keep in mind that the professional's response may not be immediate.

For direct attention, you can also book an appointment.

legalNotice.section1Title: 1. General Legal Notice – Use of TwinPro
legalNotice.section1Intro: TwinPro is a technology platform that facilitates communication between users and professionals, including interactions through AI-based digital twins.
legalNotice.natureText: TwinPro does not provide professional services nor replace direct attention from a human professional.
legalNotice.characterText: The information provided through the platform, whether by digital twins or professionals, is purely informational and for guidance purposes.
legalNotice.guaranteesText: TwinPro does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or currency of the content and is not responsible for decisions, actions, or consequences arising from the use of information obtained through the platform.
legalNotice.userResponsibilityText: The user accepts that the use of TwinPro is at their own risk.
legalNotice.warningText: IMPORTANT: Responses generated by TwinPro digital twins are produced by automated artificial intelligence systems and may be inaccurate, incomplete, outdated, or incorrect.
legalNotice.noSubstitutionText: Digital twins do not replace in any case the advice, diagnosis, evaluation, or intervention of a qualified human professional.
legalNotice.decisionLimitText: The user agrees not to base personal, professional, legal, medical, financial, or any other type of decisions exclusively on the information provided by a digital twin.
